# AlertGA4

> AlertGA4 is a daily quality-monitoring tool for Google Analytics 4 (GA4). It checks a connected GA4 property for missing events, duplicate purchases, self-referral traffic, night-time bot traffic, e-commerce funnel drop-offs, and parameter coverage, then emails an alert when a quality score drops below a configurable threshold — before broken tracking data reaches a client report.

AlertGA4 is built and operated by Bettersteps Sp. z o.o. (Warsaw, Poland). It targets GA4 property owners, marketing agencies managing several clients' GA4 properties, and freelance analytics/marketing consultants.

Access is via Google sign-in with the read-only `analytics.readonly` scope — AlertGA4 never modifies a connected GA4 property, its configuration, or its underlying data.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://alertga4.bettersteps.pl/): product overview, how it works, the checks it runs, and who it's for.
- [Funkcje](https://alertga4.bettersteps.pl/funkcje): detailed breakdown of every check AlertGA4 runs daily.
- [Cennik](https://alertga4.bettersteps.pl/cennik): plans, limits, and pricing in PLN.
- [Privacy Policy](https://alertga4.bettersteps.pl/privacy): what data is collected and how it's used.
- [Terms of Service](https://alertga4.bettersteps.pl/terms): terms governing use of the service.

## What it checks

Missing/expected events, duplicate purchase events, self-referral traffic, direct-traffic anomalies, night-time bot traffic, bounce-rate anomalies, conversion-rate drops, e-commerce funnel continuity (view_item → add_to_cart → view_cart → purchase), and whether configured event parameters actually arrive with data.

## Pricing

Three plans, billed monthly or annually in PLN, no long-term commitment: **Individual** (49 PLN/mo, up to 3 GA4 properties), **Pro** (139 PLN/mo, up to 10 properties, unlimited custom checks per property), **Agency** (399 PLN/mo, up to 100 properties, dedicated support and a monthly analyst consultation). A 14-day free trial at Agency-tier limits is available once per account, no card required. Full machine-readable pricing: [pricing.md](https://alertga4.bettersteps.pl/pricing.md).
